Zedekiah is told that the city will be taken, and that he will die a captive, but he will die a natural death. It is better to live and die penitent in a prison than to live and die impenitent in a palace.

A Jew should not be held in servitude above seven years. They and their fathers had broken this law. And when there was some hope that the siege was raised, they forced the servants they had released back into their service. Those who think to cheat God by false repentance and partial reformation deceive only themselves. This shows that freedom to sin is really only freedom to experience the harshest judgments. It is just for God to disappoint expectations of mercy when we fail to meet the expectations of duty. And when reformation comes only from fear, it is seldom lasting. Solemn promises made in this way dishonor God’s ordinances; and those who are most eager to bind themselves by appealing to God are commonly most ready to break them. Let us examine our hearts so that our repentance may be genuine, and let us ensure that the law of God governs our behavior.
